Operation 'createChatMessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original description is unclear about input requirements (messageId vs message/conversation details) and vague about outputs (what are 'IDs'?). Improved version clarifies the two input paths, explicitly lists all outputs including references and followup questions, specifies non-streaming behavior, and adds authentication requirement for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Generate an answer to a user question in a single API call. Returns the generated answer, IDs, and references. Pass the messageId if it was created, or the message and conversation details.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate AI-powered answer to user question
data.description_suggestion: Generates an AI-powered answer to a user question in a single non-streaming API call. Accepts either a messageId (if previously created) or message text with conversation details. Returns the generated answer, message ID, references to source documents, and suggested followup questions. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description is unclear about input requirements (messageId vs message/conversation details) and vague about outputs (what are 'IDs'?). Improved version clarifies the two input paths, explicitly lists all outputs including references and followup questions, specifies non-streaming behavior, and adds authentication requirement for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'getFollowupSuggestions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description lack specificity about inputs and outputs. Improved version clarifies what constitutes 'a given message' (messageId or text), explicitly states the return format (list of questions), and explains the use case for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Generate suggested followup questions for a given message.
data.description_suggestion: Generates suggested followup questions based on a given message or conversation context. Accepts a message ID or message text with conversation details as input. Returns a list of suggested followup questions that users can ask to continue the conversation. Useful for guiding users toward relevant next steps in the dialogue.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about inputs and outputs. Improved version clarifies what constitutes 'a given message' (messageId or text), explicitly states the return format (list of questions), and explains the use case for AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'recordMessageFeedback' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague about what 'feedback' means and lacks clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects. Improved version specifies feedback types, clarifies the message ID input requirement, explains the return value (confirmation), and importantly notes that this operation enables system learning—critical context for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose beyond immediate response generation.

data.current_summary: Record user feedback for a message
data.current_description: Record feedback given by the user for the generated answer.
data.description_suggestion: Records user feedback (e.g., helpful/not helpful, rating, or comments) for a generated answer to improve model performance and user experience. Accepts a message ID and feedback data. Returns confirmation of feedback receipt. This operation has no direct output to the user but enables system learning and quality improvements.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what 'feedback' means and lacks clarity on inputs, outputs, and side effects.
